chooseResponse.q: Are you attending the seminar tomorrow?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, have you heard about the new art exhibit opening this weekend?
Advisor: Yes, I read about it! Are you planning to go?
Student: Definitely! I love modern art. What about you?
Advisor: I might check it out if I have time. Do you know the entry fee?

questions.q: What is the main topic of their conversation?
questions.explain: 他們的對話主要是關於一個藝術展覽。

questions.q: What does the student think about modern art?
questions.explain: 學生對現代藝術感到興趣。

announcement.transcript: Attention, students! The campus library will be closing early today at 4 PM for maintenance. Please plan your study time accordingly. Thank you for your understanding.

questions.q: Why is the library closing early today?
questions.explain: 圖書館今天早些時候關閉是因為維護工作。

questions.q: What time will the library close?
questions.explain: 圖書館將在下午4點關閉。

talk.transcript: Today, I will discuss the concept of sustainable agriculture. This approach focuses on farming that meets current food needs without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs. Sustainable agriculture encompasses various practices, including crop rotation, organic farming, and integrated pest management. These methods enhance biodiversity, improve soil health, and reduce chemical use, which ultimately benefits both the environment and human health. By implementing sustainable techniques, farmers can create a resilient food system that supports local communities and promotes ecological balance.

questions.q: What is the main focus of sustainable agriculture?
options: Meeting current and future food needs
questions.explain: 可持續農業的主要重點是滿足當前和未來的食物需求。

questions.q: Which practice is NOT mentioned as part of sustainable agriculture?
questions.explain: 使用化肥並未被提及為可持續農業的一部分。

questions.q: How does sustainable agriculture benefit the environment?
questions.explain: 可持續農業通過增強生物多樣性來促進環境保護。

questions.q: What is one method of sustainable agriculture mentioned?
questions.explain: 提到的可持續農業方法之一是有機農業。
